title: potentilla × collina var. sordida
intro: Potentilla × collina var. sordida, also known as Dwarf Cinquefoil, is a perennial plant belonging to the Rosaceae family, characterized by its small yellow flowers and silver-green foliage. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, due to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits associated with Dwarf Cinquefoil include reducing inflammation and improving immune function, as well as exhibiting potential antioxidant and antiviral activities. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health issues, such as fever, sore throats, and digestive problems.
